name: Silver Spruce Resources Inc.
summary: Silver Spruce Resources Inc., a junior exploration company, explores for precious and base minerals. The company primarily explores for copper, zinc, lead, silver, gold, and rare earth elements. It holds 100% interest in the Pino de Plata project covering an area of 397 hectare located in southwest corner of the state of Chihuahua, Mexico; and 100% interest in the Melchett Lake VMS Project covering an area of 3,996 hectares located in the Thunder Bay mining district, Northern Ontario, Canada. The company also holds an agreement to acquire a 50% interest in the Jackie Gold project located in Eastern Sonora, Mexico. The company was formerly known as First Labrador Acquisitions Inc. and changed its name to Silver Spruce Resources Inc. in October 2004. Silver Spruce Resources Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Bedford, Canada.
